name: peo-case-001-florence-fup
title: PEO Case 001 — T0 Enumeration of the Firenze crui.unifi Corpus

extraction.method: streaming tar member scan; per-month client_id CSVs; global client filter

reconciliation_with_tier1.note: DataCite client-count APIs report findable-state DOIs. T0 enumeration retains all states including 2 in 'registered' state, for a total of 14284 unique identifiers under prefix 10.13128.

current_resolution_state.note: Every DOI in this enumeration currently dead-ends at FUP's inactive-DOI page. This dataset is the recovery map for the corpus.

data_quality_notes.note: 2 DOIs in the corpus embed the prefix a second time in the suffix (10.13128/10.13128/*). These resolve as valid DataCite identifiers at t0 but should be inspected during any re-registration pass.

files.description: The 14,284 DOIs sorted alphabetically. Columns: doi, state, client_id, updated, source_month.
Structured summary of the corpus: state, prefix, update-year, source-month distributions.

license_note: Redistributed from the DataCite Public Data File 2025 under CC-BY-4.0. See landing DOI 10.14454/t5qb-d995.
generator: TACHYON via streaming tar extractor (chunked HTTP Range fetches; see MANIFEST.methodology)
